title: Intellia Therapeutics (NTLA) Stock Forecast, Price Targets and Analysts Predictions
text: The consensus rating from 21 analysts is Buy, with 14 recommending buying the stock, 2 suggesting selling, and 9 recommending holding. Analysts have varying price targets for NTLA with an average 12-month price target of $25.29 USD, with a high estimate of $106 USD and a low estimate of $5 USD. According to Wall Street analysts, the average 1-year price target for NTLA is $23.94 USD with a low forecast of $5.05 USD and a high forecast of $111.3 USD. Intellia Therapeutics is expected to deliver improved earnings while experiencing a revenue decline. The company projects a quarterly loss per share improvement of 16.4% year-over-year. Myles Minter reiterated Buy on Intellia, citing extended cash runway and strong Phase III data for lonvo-z. Overall, analysts maintain a bullish outlook on NTLA with a consensus Buy rating, though with a wide range of price target estimates reflecting the speculative nature of the biotech sector.
